name: NON INVASIVE MONITORING SYSTEMS INC /FL/
summary: Non-Invasive Monitoring Systems, Inc. (NIMS) is a Florida-incorporated shell company that previously engaged in research, development, manufacturing, marketing, and sales of non-invasive, motorized, whole body periodic acceleration (WBPA) platforms. These therapeutic platforms were intended to temporarily increase local circulation, relieve minor aches and pains, promote muscle relaxation, and reduce morning stiffness. The company effectively discontinued operations in May 2019 and currently holds no inventory and offers no products for sale.
